case_title: PETE GAMEZ VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY BILL FORD--ASSISTANT GENERAL COUNSEL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMEZ, PETE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED DEC-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GAMEZ, PETE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAMEZ, PETE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2013 - JUDGMENT.
